prompt_text:
### Demographics: 55-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Major Depressive Disorder
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~6.2 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 73.3 kg; Height 169.6 cm; BMI 25.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/83 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.5%; 9 months ago 6.8%; 6 months ago 6.5%; 3 months ago 6.8%; current 6.7%), FPG (12 months ago 126mg/dL; 9 months ago 158mg/dL; 6 months ago 126mg/dL; 3 months ago 134mg/dL; current 131mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 77.1kg; 9 months ago 73.8kg; 6 months ago 74.2kg; 3 months ago 74.2kg; current 73.3kg), Height (12 months ago 169.6cm; 9 months ago 169.6cm; 6 months ago 169.6cm; 3 months ago 169.6cm; current 169.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 27.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 26.0kg/m²; current 25.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 132mmHg; 9 months ago 131mmHg; 6 months ago 129mmHg; 3 months ago 132mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 84mmHg; 9 months ago 85mmHg; 6 months ago 86mmHg; 3 months ago 84mmHg; current 83mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 26U/L; 9 months ago 28U/L; 6 months ago 27U/L; 3 months ago 18U/L; current 24U/L), AST (12 months ago 24U/L; 9 months ago 23U/L; 6 months ago 16U/L; 3 months ago 16U/L; current 19U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 59mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; current 56mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 146mg/g; 9 months ago 133mg/g; 6 months ago 180mg/g; 3 months ago 125mg/g; current 122mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 91mg/dL; 9 months ago 95mg/dL; 6 months ago 96mg/dL; 3 months ago 96mg/dL; current 93mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 60mg/dL; 9 months ago 60mg/dL; 6 months ago 57mg/dL; 3 months ago 57mg/dL; current 59mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 111mg/dL; 9 months ago 94mg/dL; 6 months ago 110mg/dL; 3 months ago 115mg/dL; current 105mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.2g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 13.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
